title: pelargonium × quadriflorum
intro: Pelargonium × quadriflorum, also known as Rose Geranium or Red-Leafed Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, known for its distinctive red-tinged leaves and fragrant, pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a restful sleep. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include its ability to regulate hormones, improve mood, and alleviate menstrual cramps, making it a popular choice for women's health remedies. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption and application in aromatherapy and natural skincare routines.
